productDisplayName: Puma Women Super Elevate White Sports Shoes
description: These stylish cross-trainers from puma make a trendy statement, combining superior performance. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. You can also team these with jeans and tees for a stylishly casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Lace-up front with padded tongue and collar for snug Fit Textile lining for extra comfort puma formstripes on the sides Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on the toe counter and behind heel Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole for firm support and durability Mutli-directional lugs for better frip on all surfaces Elevated heel for ergonomic comfort Midfoot shank for support
